log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kalashtar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Kalashtar — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kalashtar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kalashtar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Kalashtar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 130/135
REASONING: Finger of Death on Kalashtar — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Kalashtar — Winged Striker.
→ Kalashtar — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 20] FAIL! 28 necrotic damage. HP: 39/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
